titleStmt.title: SII 9.436: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 436. (A.R. No. 25 of 1904.) ON A SLAB LYING IN FRONT OF THE TEMPLE AT MALAPANGUDI, HOSPET TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 1333, Khara, Māgha, ba. 5 Bu[dhavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1412 February 3, Wednesday. It refers itself to the reign of Dēvarāya-Mahārāya and records that the Heggaḍe Sōvaṇṇa-Aṇṇa, son of Buḷḷe-Nāyaka constructed a water-shed at the junction of the roads leading to Bisilahaḷḷi-kaṇuve and Baḍavaliyakaṇuve and, purchasing three vṛitti lands from three Brāhmans (named), made provision for repairing the well and the water-shed, for purchase of utensils and for the remuneration of the persons employed.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīvirūpākṣāya namaḥ . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁ
dracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudayaśakavaruṣa 1333 ne
ya kharasaṁvatsarada māgha ba 5 bu . śrīmadrājādhirāja rājapa
ramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa dēvarāyamahārāyaru rājyaṁ pāli
suvalli śrīmadbhāskarakṣētrada śrīvirūpākṣadēvara paṁcakōśadoḷage
bisilahaḷḷiya kaṇuveya baḍavaliya kaṇuveya hādi kūḍida mahāpa
thadalli buḷḷenāykara makkaḷu heggaḍe sōvaṁṇaAṁṇagaḷu Aṟavaṭigeyanikki
si māḷige kūpārāmavanu māḍisi �yo Aṟavaṭigeya dhar(ṁ)ma Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyiyāgi naḍeyabēkeṁdu vikrutisaṁvatsarada vayiśākha su 15 lu . Eju
śākheya kāśyapagōtrada Allāḷabhaṭṭara makkaḷu Ādavāniya keṁcaviṣṇudī
kṣitara kayyalu sōvaṁṇaAṁṇagaḷu ta(ṁ)mma dēhārada yajuśākheya bhara
dvājagōtrada śrīdharabhaṭṭara makkaḷu virupaṁṇagaḷa hesara krayadalu maḷava
dālūralu vritti 1 kkaṁ pra ga 120 kraya mariyāde vritti 2 kkaṁ pra ga 240 hoṁnū
sāvaṁṇaAṁṇagaḷu Ā viṣṇudīkṣitarige salisikoṁḍa vritti 2 Ā vrittiya vivara
Erada haḷada lakṣmīnārāyaṇabhaṭṭarā sēnabōva viṭhṭhappana naḍuvaṇa bījavari ḷa 7 da vri
tti 1 baṁniyavārada . Aḍḍadāriyiṁ baḍagalu cokimaṁṇagaḷa keyyiṁ mūḍalu ḷa 7
da bījavariya vritti 1 mattaṁ moḷaganamoṭṭeyalu rukkuśākheya bharadvājagōtra
da naraharibhaṭṭara makkaḷu Accaṁṇagaḷa kayyalu vritti 1 kke pra ga 170 ṟa kraya
dalu koṁḍu koṭṭa vritti 1 Ā vrittiya vivara . kaḷasāpurada sūrappagaḷa paṭṭeya
voḷage benakana daṁḍigeyada bījavari ḷa 7 da vritti 1 A(ṁ)ntu �yo mūṟu vrittiya be
ḷeya Ādāyavanu mūru bhāgava māḍi Ā Aṟavaṭigeya naḍasuva viru
paṁṇagaḷige voṁdu bhāge Aṟavaṭigege nīra hoyivadakke maragaḷige nīra neṟava
dakke māḷige giḷilādare kaṭṭuvadakke Aravaṭigege guḍāṇa biṁdige karaga mo
ghegaḷa krayakke suttaṇa mani Aṇimāḍikoṇḍu yihadakke bāvi hūḷi
dare tōḍuvadakke yiṣṭara Upakṣayakke mikka Eraḍu bhāge saluUdu
�yo mariyādeyalu Ā virupaṁṇagaḷu taṁna makkaḷu makkaḷu tappade
Aṟavaṭigeya dhar(ṁ)mmavanu naḍasuvaru naḍesade Uḷidare ĀrādareU dhar(ṁ)mmi
ṣṭarāgi yiddavaru �yo śāsanavanu vōdisi nōḍi Ā vrittigaḷanū vicārava mā
ḍi muṁde Ā Aṟavaṭigeya dhar(ṁ)mmava naḍasuvātage voṁdu bhāge saluU
du Aṟavaṭigege nīraneṟavara jīvita modalāda Ellā Upakṣayakke Ā Uḷi
da Eraḍu bhāge saluUdu �yo mūṟu vritti dharma Ā Aṟavaṭigeya
dhar(ṁ)makke saluvau muṁde Ārobbarū kraya Adhidāna parivartane
ge koḍasalla koṁbavaru koḷasalla �yo dhar(ṁ)mmavanu �yo mariyā
lu naḍasuvavarige Aśvamēdhādiyāgaṁgaḷa phalavahudu . �yo dha
rmmagaṁṭakarige bra(ṁ)hmahatyādipātakaṁgaḷu saṁbhavisuvau . śrī
buḷḷapō yasya janakō mātā ti(ṁ)mmāṁbikā tathā . kuladaivaṁ kulasvā
�mo śrīmānmayilāraśaṁkaraḥ . sōvaṁṇaṁṇana dha
rmada Aṟavaṭige .
Digital edition of SII 9.436 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
